MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-24-2013 IN 206, PLAINTIFF MOSES JAVAHERI'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. JACOB HARKER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. EDWARD RODZEWICH APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT STEPHAN BAGNESCHI. THERE WAS NO FORMAL OPPOSITION THAT WAS FILED, ONLY A DECLARATION. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/13/14 IS CONTINUED TO 4/7/14 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE ORIGINAL PERIOD FOR DISCLOSURE OF EXPERTS IS RE-OPENED AND THAT PERIOD EXTENDS THRU AND INCLUDING 1/7/14 AND 10 DAYS AFTER THAT WILL BE ANY SUPPLEMENTAL DISCLOSURE AND THIS IS ONLY FOR A SINGLE MEDICAL EXPERT. DISCOVERY IS NOT RE-OPENED. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION IS TO BE COMPLETED BY 1/31/14. NOTICE WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AND APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: RVELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
